entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut (Arachis hypogaea L.), a segmental amphidiploid with a basic chromosome number of 10

entities.name: SEGMENTAL AMPHIDIPLOID
entities.description: A genomic state where the organism has multiple sets of chromosomes but behaves as a diploid

entities.name: DIPLOID
entities.description: An organism or cell containing two complete sets of chromosomes

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing two different species to create a hybrid

entities.name: A. DURANENSIS
entities.description: A wild species of groundnut and an ancestor of Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: A. IPAENSIS
entities.description: A wild species of groundnut and an ancestor of Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: PERU
entities.description: The geographical location where archaeological evidence places the origin of A. hypogaea
